heading: Biannual briefing on nuclear weapons and related activities
label: 492b Biannual briefing on nuclear weapons and related activities
notes: CodificationAs enacted by , “SEC.” preceding section designation and catchline text were editorially conformed to the style used in this title.Pub. L. 117–263
Amendments2024—Subsec. (b)(2). substituted “Nuclear Deterrence, Chemical, and Biological Defense Policy and Programs” for “Nuclear, Chemical, and Biological Defense Programs”.Pub. L. 118–159
amendments: Amendments2024—Subsec. (b)(2). substituted “Nuclear Deterrence, Chemical, and Biological Defense Policy and Programs” for “Nuclear, Chemical, and Biological Defense Programs”.Pub. L. 118–159

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: On or about May 1 and November 1 of each year, the officials specified in subsection (b) shall provide to the Committees on Armed Services of the Senate and the House of Representatives a briefing on matters relating to nuclear weapons policies, operations, technology development, and other similar topics as requested by such committees.
The Assistant Secretary of Defense for Acquisition.
The Assistant Secretary of Defense for Nuclear Deterrence, Chemical, and Biological Defense Policy and Programs.
The Assistant Secretary of Defense for Space Policy.
The Deputy Administrator for Defense Programs of the National Nuclear Security Administration.
The Director for Strategy, Plans, and Policy of the Joint Staff.
The Director for Capability and Resource Integration for the United States Strategic Command.

children.heading: .—Delegation
children.label: c .—Delegation
children.text: An official specified in subsection (b) may delegate the authority to provide a briefing under subsection (a) to a member of the Senior Executive Service who reports to the official.

children.heading: .—Termination
children.label: d .—Termination
children.text: The requirement to provide a briefing under subsection (a) shall terminate on .January 1, 2028
